title: I reached out

posts.author: hey_there_its_josh (not josh)
posts.cookedHtml:
So I messaged support@monday.com and I got the bot so after a bit it says got Got it, I went ahead and transferred you to one of our support team members.
For reference, you ticket id is: 3779325
I will create a new thread for the ticket. So feel free to continue the conversation if you have any more questions.
If you’d like to add more information, please add it in the new email thread.
Thank you. so how long do I wait for a human to answer me
